blockers.title: Pending-guardian minors can still use portal/profile features before guardian confirmation
blockers.evidence: The spec requires 13-17 accounts to stay unusable until guardian confirmation (specs/join-form-compliance.spec.md:27-31; vault Under-18 decision lines 37-45). The auth hook moves minors to pending_guardian after email verification (convex/auth.ts:139-145), but Dashboard always exposes the profile editor (src/portal/Dashboard.tsx:109-118), and generatePhotoUploadUrl/updateProfile only require a linked member row, not active/guardian-confirmed status (convex/members.ts:120-136, 166-204).
blockers.required_fix: Gate member-facing mutations and dashboard actions by lifecycle/member_lane. For pending_guardian, show only a pending guardian confirmation state/youth-safe signpost; block profile edits, photo uploads, consent changes, and any adult/member surfaces until guardian confirmation. Add Convex tests for pending_guardian denial.

blockers.title: Failed Turnstile submissions consume join rate limits and create stored state
blockers.evidence: Bot hardening requires Turnstile failures to be silently rejected and not stored (vault PRD lines 67, 81; spec lines 41-44). submitJoin consumes join24h per-email/global buckets at convex/members.ts:296-310 before verifying Turnstile at lines 312-315. Five invalid-token requests can rate-limit a victim email for a day; 300 invalid-token requests can trip the global join cap.
blockers.required_fix: Verify Turnstile before consuming join rate buckets, or make rate-limit consumption rollback/no-op for failed human checks. Ensure failed Turnstile and honeypot submissions create no member, consent, guardian, email, or rate-limit side effects. Add regression tests.

blockers.title: Server-side field validation is incomplete
blockers.evidence: The PRD/spec require server-side validation/normalisation and length caps for every field (vault PRD lines 63-67; spec lines 41-44). careerStageAnswer is accepted as v.string at convex/members.ts:235, forwarded at line 329, and stored at line 390 without checking CAREER_STAGES or length. guardianName is only length-checked (lines 283-292) and then stored (lines 401-404). Name sentence rejection is also weak: isValidNamePart only enforces allowed chars and <=4 words (convex/lib/names.ts:7-20), so short sentences can pass.
blockers.required_fix: Add a single join validation layer covering careerStageAnswer against CAREER_STAGES, length caps for every string input, guardian-name character/sanitisation rules, duplicate-lookingFor handling, and stronger name sentence rejection. Unit-test adversarial payloads.

blockers.title: Guardian consent capture lacks its own audit trail
blockers.evidence: Stage 0 says every member-affecting write/action needs mandatory AuditLog evidence (vault Stage 0 lines 219, 251). createPendingMember inserts guardianConsents at convex/members.ts:400-410, but the only normal audit row is submitJoin at lines 438-445; it does not record guardian consent capture/state as a distinct compliance event.
blockers.required_fix: Write an audit row when guardianConsents is created, e.g. action captureGuardianConsent with member id/state and no raw guardian PII in the summary. Add a test that a minor join creates the guardian row and matching audit evidence.

blockers.title: Acceptance tests do not cover join rate rules or critical server paths
blockers.evidence: Spec criterion 14 requires tests for join rate rules (spec lines 52-54). tests/unit/rateLimit.test.ts only imports PER_EMAIL_SHORT, PER_EMAIL_DAY, and GLOBAL_DAY (lines 1-7, 41-50); no test references PER_EMAIL_JOIN_DAY/GLOBAL_JOIN_DAY or submitJoin rate behavior. Existing Convex tests cover under-13 and pipeline guard only, not minor guardian row/audit, duplicate-email no-send, failed Turnstile no-side-effects, or career-stage validation.
blockers.required_fix: Add unit/Convex tests for PER_EMAIL_JOIN_DAY=5/day, GLOBAL_JOIN_DAY=300/day, failed Turnstile no side effects, duplicate join no member/no email path, minor guardian row/audit, and rejected invalid careerStageAnswer/guardian/name payloads.

non_blocking_notes: I attempted npm test -- --run, but the read-only sandbox blocked Vite from writing node_modules/.vite-temp/vitest.config...mjs, so there is no green local test/build evidence from this review.

Targeted em-dash cleanup appears to hold for src/portal member-visible strings and the edited Arabic page titles; remaining en dashes found are the explicitly owner-held Arabic org-name case and SOURCE-MAP punctuation.

spec_compliance.criterion: 1. Gender field Female / Male, Female pre-selected, no Woman/Ally labels
spec_compliance.evidence: JoinApp renders label Gender and exactly Female/Male radios (src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:396-416).

spec_compliance.criterion: 2. First name + Last name validation and Title Case
spec_compliance.evidence: Inputs and Title Case exist, but short pasted sentences can pass isValidNamePart's <=4-word rule (convex/lib/names.ts:7-20).

spec_compliance.criterion: 3. Email normalisation, disposable rejection, duplicate route without second record/email
spec_compliance.evidence: Email validation/normalisation exists (convex/lib/joinValidation.ts:24-32), and duplicate createPendingMember returns sign_in before insert (convex/members.ts:361-370).

spec_compliance.criterion: 4. Country fixed single-select stored to country_of_residence
spec_compliance.evidence: Client fixed select plus server isValidCountry; stored at convex/members.ts:391.

spec_compliance.criterion: 5. Looking-for multi-select from LOOKING_FOR stored to looking_for
spec_compliance.evidence: Client uses LOOKING_FOR and server validates list values; stored at convex/members.ts:392.

spec_compliance.criterion: 6. DOB under-13 refusal and 13-17 guardian branch with unusable minor lane
spec_compliance.evidence: Under-13 and guardian row are partly implemented, but pending_guardian minors can still enter dashboard/profile editing before guardian confirmation.
Rendered at src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:499-510 and required server-side at convex/members.ts:255-258.

spec_compliance.criterion: 8. Certificate-name confirm step after valid submit, before account creation
spec_compliance.evidence: Confirm screen exists (src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:164-206), but it appears before server validation and the string differs from the required wording.

spec_compliance.criterion: 9. Consent lines, defaults OFF, explicit false rows
spec_compliance.evidence: Terms/attestation/marketing/pipeline UI is unchecked by state defaults; all three consent rows are inserted at convex/members.ts:434-436.

spec_compliance.criterion: 10. Bot hardening, all fields length-capped/sanitised, join rate limits
spec_compliance.evidence: Rate limits are consumed before Turnstile; careerStageAnswer and other fields are not fully server-validated/lencapped.

spec_compliance.criterion: 11. Em-dash cleanup in targeted member-visible strings
spec_compliance.evidence: No U+2014/U+2013 found in src/portal/*.tsx; Arabic org-name en dash remains as the documented BRAND-3 owner item.

spec_compliance.criterion: 12. BRAND-4 HowToJoin confirm-token comment removed from built HTML
spec_compliance.evidence: HTML comment was replaced with an Astro JSX-style comment in src/components/membership/HowToJoin.astro.
SOURCE-MAP.md adds rows for Join, Portal, Certificate verify, and Arabic routes.
Join shell E2E and validation unit tests exist, but join rate-rule tests and critical server behavior coverage are missing.
The slice enables pending_guardian minors to use existing member/profile surfaces before guardian confirmation, contrary to the spec's unusable-until-confirmed constraint.

summary: DO-NOT-SHIP. The UI fixes are mostly present, but the slice has real safeguarding, bot-hardening, validation, audit, and test-coverage blockers that must be fixed before Gate 4 can pass.
